semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the ContextEngine class.
responsibilities: Test that ContextEngine.resolveDependencies correctly resolves imported module symbols and generates context data.
Validate that the engine returns proper symbol edges and diagnostics for the given file skeleton.
Mock manifest and skeleton inputs to isolate ContextEngine behavior from real file system.
outOfScope: Integration or end-to-end scenarios involving real file I/O.
Cross-module contract tests between ContextEngine and other engines.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide deterministic coverage for the dependency resolution logic of ContextEngine, validating that import analysis works correctly across relative, absolute, and external imports.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of a broader refactor that removed legacy CLI aliases and rebuilt documentation; this test file was updated to maintain alignment with changes to the ContextEngine interface or behavior.
